overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing two student characters sitting on a stone ledge overlooking a snowy castle courtyard. The scene features gothic architecture with floating house banners, snow-covered ground, and various NPC students walking through the courtyard. The atmosphere is calm and wintry with clear skies and natural daylight.

agents.ego_description: two student characters sitting on a stone ledge overlooking the courtyard, occasionally shifting position slightly

notable_agents.action: student in yellow dress standing near the planter in the distance
distant students walking across the snowy courtyard

entered.detail: snow-covered stone ground with footprints in the foreground
large gothic stone castle structures with multiple towers and windows
red and yellow vertical banners suspended in the air above the courtyard
stone archway entrance on the right side of the courtyard
large ornate stone planter with vegetation on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on two students sitting on a ledge overlooking a snowy castle courtyard. The gothic architecture of Hogwarts rises in the background with floating house banners visible against the clear winter sky. A few distant students are scattered across the courtyard, including one figure in yellow standing near a decorative planter.

events.description: student in dark robes walks from left to right passing closely behind the seated characters

agents.ego_description: characters remain seated, the one on the right turns their head to watch the passing student

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with yellow scarf walking past the camera from left to right

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary as a student in dark robes walks closely past the seated characters from left to right. The character on the right turns to observe the passing student. The background activity in the courtyard continues with other distant students moving about.

agents.ego_description: characters return to facing forward, continuing to observe the courtyard activity

notable_agents.action: group of students walking together across the mid-ground of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The seated characters return to their forward-facing observation of the courtyard. Various students continue to walk through the snowy grounds in the background, with a small group passing through the mid-ground. The scene maintains its calm, wintry atmosphere with the castle architecture prominent in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, observational perspective of a snowy castle courtyard that shifts from a wide architectural view to a focused moment of character interaction. It begins with two students perched on a stone ledge, overlooking the gothic spires of Hogwarts and floating house banners under a clear winter sky. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts to the immediate foreground when a student in dark robes walks closely past the pair, prompting the character on the right to turn and observe them. The scene then expands back toward the courtyard as the seated characters return to their forward-facing gaze, watching a small group of students drift through the mid-ground. Finally, the view settles back into a calm, wintry tableau of distant figures moving across the snow-covered grounds against the prominent backdrop of the castle.
